title: Ensure fields in Serializable classes are either transient or serializable
description: This rule checks that non-static fields in a Serializable class are either Serializable or transient. Violations can lead to application crashes and security vulnerabilities.
recommendation: Make non-static fields transient or implement Serializable
impact: Prevent application crashes and security vulnerabilities

checks.message: Make non-static fields transient or implement Serializable
